summary: Docs-only GH-13 changes stay within the approved boundary: pending decisions plus item-specific Loom carrier.
reviewed_validation_summary: Initial carrier created before final commit; update or supersede review if merge-ready requires current-head semantic approval.
follow_ups: Open separate Work Items for executable UI/API/schema work.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change records product boundary decisions and does not alter executable behavior.

consumed_inputs.validation: git diff --check; loom doctor/verify/fact-chain; loom installed-state validate; direct PR gate; hosted required checks
